name: Analyze Food Supply Chain Capabilities and Capacity with Food Safety Considerations
description: This process analyzes the food supply chain's capabilities and capacity to meet demand while ensuring compliance with food safety regulations and managing critical control points, allergen risks, and cold chain integrity
sector_specific_kpis: percentage of suppliers with valid food safety certifications
number of critical control points with validated logic
notes: Implementation requires integration with food safety management systems and consideration of validated logic for critical control points. AI agents should be trained on food safety regulations and industry best practices to ensure accurate decision-making.
